character.definition: stone, to sharpen a knife, sharp-pointed; sharp, vigorous; energetic; keen
rice boiled to gruel, congee; porridge
wine; rich wine, (same as 醍) a kind of reddish wine
(simplified form of 䥇) Samarium (Sm); (archaic form of 鋱) Terbium (Tb); (same as 釤) a sickle with a long handle, to swing a sickle to cut (grass or wheat)
urge on; rise up; stir, excite
a pig-sty; a kind of medicinal plant
to move swiftly; to dart; to fleet; to drive very fast
